title: wollastonia glabrata
intro: Wollastonia glabrata, also known as the Philippine cotton bush or cotton bush, is a type of shrub native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Wollastonia glabrata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
